page.title: Account type comparison
page.intro: What can each account type do? The table below gives a complete overview per feature. Viewer and Editor are not account types — they are family tree rights granted by an Owner.

tabel.sectie_title: What can each account type do?

donatie.title: ☕ Donation options (Owner account)
donatie.intro: An Owner account is activated via a donation. Basic accounts (guest) are completely free.
donatie.noot: Transparency: there is no automatic payment verification yet. The Owner account is activated manually after receipt of a donation. This will be automated in a future phase.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.v1_vraag: Do I need to donate to use the app?
faq.v1_antwoord: No. A basic account (guest) is completely free and requires no donation. You get access to a local family tree with up to 60 persons.
faq.v2_vraag: What is the difference between a Viewer and a basic account?
faq.v2_antwoord: Viewer and Editor are family tree rights, not account types. A user with a basic account (guest) can be invited by an Owner as Viewer or Editor on a specific family tree. The rights are stored in a separate table, not in the account.
faq.v3_vraag: What happens if I stop the recurring donation?
faq.v3_antwoord: Your account reverts to basic (guest). The Owner can then no longer share new family trees or invite Viewers/Editors. There is no automatic blocking in the MVP — this will be automated in a later phase.
faq.v4_vraag: Is my data safe if I stop donating?
faq.v4_antwoord: Your local data always stays on your device. Cloud backups are tied to your Owner status — export your data regularly as a safety net.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.tekst: Start for free with a basic account, or go back to the overview for more explanation.
